description: Core window/app/event/path/webview permissions needed by every workflow in the single 'main' window (window chrome, IPC events, path resolution, and the webview handle DICOM SR uses for drag-drop). Deliberately narrower than the core:default bundle, which also grants core:image, core:menu, core:resources, and core:tray defaults — unused (no tray icon, no custom menu, no runtime image manipulation, no Tauri Resource API calls anywhere in the app).
